creator: pedersen@meridian-enviro.com
text:
cjc installs okay, but does not run.  It emits the following output:

<pedersen@orion:~> $ cjc
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/bin/cjc", line 13, in ?
    from cjc import main
  File "/usr/local/share/cjc/cjc/main.py", line 19, in ?
    import libxml2
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.4/site-packages/libxml2.py", line 1, in ?
    import libxml2mod
ImportError: /usr/local/lib/python2.4/site-packages/libxml2mod.so: Undefined symbol "xmlXPathContextSetCache"
<pedersen@orion:~> $

	The following versions of the dependencies are installed:

<pedersen@orion:~> $ grep cjc /var/db/pkg/*/+REQUIRED_BY
/var/db/pkg/libiconv-1.9.2_2/+REQUIRED_BY:cjc-1.0.0
/var/db/pkg/libxml2-2.6.24_1/+REQUIRED_BY:cjc-1.0.0
/var/db/pkg/openssl-beta-0.9.8b_1/+REQUIRED_BY:cjc-1.0.0
/var/db/pkg/pkgconfig-0.20/+REQUIRED_BY:cjc-1.0.0
/var/db/pkg/pkgconfig-0.20_2/+REQUIRED_BY:cjc-1.0.0
/var/db/pkg/py24-dnspython-1.4.0/+REQUIRED_BY:cjc-1.0.0
/var/db/pkg/py24-libxml2-2.6.26/+REQUIRED_BY:cjc-1.0.0
/var/db/pkg/py24-m2crypto-0.13.1/+REQUIRED_BY:cjc-1.0.0
/var/db/pkg/py24-pyxmpp-1.0.0/+REQUIRED_BY:cjc-1.0.0
/var/db/pkg/python-2.4.3/+REQUIRED_BY:cjc-1.0.0
<pedersen@orion:~> $

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: 	Install cjc and attempt to execute it.
